_doc: Real-model A/B with full traces: candidate A = claude-sonnet-4-6, B = claude-haiku-4-5, both via the claude_cli backend (real `claude` on PATH). Inherits the A/B pipeline + the rich trace (capture phase+cost+tools, JSONL file sink) from arch-drift-ab.local.json; only swaps the fake provider for claude_cli (by_model null deletes the scripted map). Needs `claude` AND `mmdc` on PATH. Run from this dir: `yaah run arch-drift-ab.real.json`, approve a/b at the gate, then `yaah trace trace-ab.jsonl --pretty --cost prices.json` for REAL per-model tokens + $ (the offline .local run is $0 because it's a fake model).
